method: boolean(openscad-native-csg) per grid cell vs reference cell tessellation
architecture: shared measured-outline loft (outline.scad, 50 X-Z convex section stations) + measured interior voids (voids.scad); body0_whole.scad = the 8 parts reunited as ONE piece (same outer form minus the union of the voids)
note: voxel contains() reports phantom FN on these non-watertight CSG meshes — boolean(openscad-native-csg) is the trusted metric (CLAUDE.md trap)
